Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.repository

package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.repository
Contains the classes necessary to support a repository of objects in a DynamoDB table.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb
    The dynamodb package contains packages and classes supporting integration of IZ Gateway Hub with DynamoDB as it's back end database.
    gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model
    Contains classes representing the entities stored in DynamoDB
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AccessControlRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for AccessControls.
    AccessGroupRepository
    Repository for managing AccessGroup entities in DynamoDB.
    AllowedUserRepository
    Repository for managing AllowedUser entities in DynamoDB.
    CertificateStatusRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for CertificateStatus.
    DenyListRecordRepository
    Repository for managing DenyListRecord entities in DynamoDB.
    DestinationRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Destinations.
    EndpointStatusRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for EndpointStatus.
    EventRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Events.
    FileTypeRepository
    Repository for managing FileType entities in DynamoDB.
    JurisdictionRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Jurisdictions.
    MessageHeaderRepository
    Class representing the DynamoDb repository for MessageHeaders.
    OrganizationRecordRepository
    Repository for managing OrganizationRecord entities in DynamoDB.
